headline: Salesforce Stock Gets Downgraded. Analyst Admits It Might Be ‘Exactly the Wrong Time.’
summary: Salesforce  stock was downgraded late Wednesday by an analyst at KeyBanc who admitted he might be doing it “at exactly the wrong time.”  Salesforce has fallen 37% this year and the  iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF  is down 13% amid fears about the disruption caused by artificial intelligence.  More than 70% of analysts covering Salesforce stock think it’s a Buy, with an average price target of $241.08, implying a 45% jump from Wednesday’s closing price of $166.58.

content.title: Salesforce Stock Gets Downgraded. Analyst Admits It Might Be ‘Exactly the Wrong Time.’

More than 70% of analysts covering Salesforce stock think it’s a Buy, with an average price target of $241.08, implying a 45% jump from Wednesday’s closing price of $166.58.
